description: Cube is a financial planning and analysis (FP&A) platform that connects company financial data, spreadsheets, and reporting workflows. It provides governed financial data access for integrations and AI clients.
summary: Cube exposes a REST API at `https://api.cubesoftware.com` and a hosted MCP server at `https://mcp.cubesoftware.com/`; both use OAuth-based authentication, and no public GraphQL API or CLI was found.
